legacy.content:
# Phase 42-01 Summary - Docs Content Pack Report Ingestion
## Completed - Added `docs-site/lib/content-pack-report.ts`. - Added `POST/GET /api/content-packs/reports` route with index + persisted reports. - Added `/play/reports/content-packs` page. - Space Explorer now accepts `?contentPackReportId=<id>` and loads report vectors. - Added unit test coverage for reports route.
